theme_notes: The US-Iran war escalates again (IRGC closes Strait of Hormuz, 140 US strikes overnight, ceasefire collapses a second time); the 2026 World Cup semifinals lock in — England vs Argentina in Atlanta (Bellingham brace, Alvarez at 112') and France vs Spain in Dallas.
settled: Balance: zero. Even the US-Iran ceasefire lasted longer than your last money fight.
France, Spain, England, Argentina all in the semis. You two are also sorted.
Bellingham scored twice. You're both even. Peak July perfection.
youOwe: You owe less than a pint at the World Cup viewing party. Go sort it.
The Strait of Hormuz has more flow than your Venmo right now.
Osaka beat the world No. 1. You can't overcome a $40 tab?
McGregor spent five years coming back. You've spent weeks warming up to paying this.
Argentina needed 112 minutes to score. Stop buying time with your debt.
Oil prices are spiking across the Middle East. Your Venmo is also frozen.
Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz. Your partner is considering closing the apartment door.
France 2, Morocco 0. Clinical. Your partner expects the same efficiency.
Bellingham scored twice for England and simply met expectations. Set yours.
The US hit 140 Iranian targets overnight. Your partner has a spreadsheet too.
England and Argentina play in Atlanta. You can't afford a ticket. That's related.
Zelenskyy fired his entire cabinet. Your partner is looking at the options.
The US-Iran ceasefire collapsed in under a week. Your partner's patience took less.
Spain edged Belgium. France crushed Morocco. You are the Morocco of this relationship.
Iran closed one strait and disrupted global energy. You're doing something similar.
The Strait of Hormuz moves 20% of world oil. Your debt is also systemically important.
140 US strikes in one night. Consider this your final warning.
England vs. Argentina in Atlanta. A World Cup semifinal ticket costs less than you.
theyOwe: Wimbledon's in quarterfinals. This debt is still stuck in the first round.
Osaka won in straight sets. Collect this in straight sets too.
Under $50. The Strait of Hormuz is open-ish. So is your patience. Barely.
McGregor came back after five years. Don't let this sit that long.
Alvarez scored in the 112th minute. Your deadline is somewhat sooner.
Under $200 and they still haven't paid. The disrespect alone costs more.
France didn't hesitate against Morocco. Neither should you.
Iran fired on a ship in the Strait of Hormuz. This friendship is also taking fire.
England squeezed through on a Bellingham double. It's time to squeeze.
The ceasefire crumbled in 24 hours. Collect before your goodwill does too.
The US launched strikes after one ship got hit. You've taken more hits than that.
Argentina survived to the 112th minute on heart. You're running out of heart here.
The US-Iran ceasefire lasted less than a week. This friendship is similarly fragile.
France vs. Spain in Dallas. Two heavyweights. Time to stop being small about this.
Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz. Consider closing the Strait of Generosity.
140 US strikes on Iran in one night. You've shown more restraint than is warranted.
The Strait of Hormuz is officially closed. This friendship is next in line.
England vs. Argentina is going to Atlanta. This debt is going to a lawyer.
